methodology_labels.completed_trade_overlay_estimate: Diagnostic adjustment to completed baseline trades; useful for hypothesis triage, not rule approval.
methodology_labels.deferred_requires_rejected_signal_replay: Needs per-candle rejected-signal replay before truthful testing.
methodology_labels.lookahead_diagnostic_proxy: Uses information unavailable at decision time; never candidate evidence.
methodology_labels.reporting_only_attribution: Explains observed baseline trades without changing decisions.
methodology_labels.true_forward_replay: Chronological replay that can be considered candidate evidence if baseline parity and controls hold.

rsi_macd_rejection_summary.reason: canonical SV2.0.2 packs expose aggregate no-trade reason counts but not full rejected-candle indicator traces
